description: A chunk of a game asset stored on a PDS. Enables storage-only mode: store WAD and engine as blobs, fetch and run locally.

main.description: Record containing one chunk of a game asset (WAD file, engine binary, etc.).

index.description: Zero-based chunk index within the asset.

totalChunks.description: Total number of chunks for this asset.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the complete reassembled asset (same across all chunks).

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this artifact was originally created.
